settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your VieXF experience
settings.background_effect_desc: Show animated gradient blobs on the background.
settings.run_admin_desc: Force app to always request admin privileges.
settings.show_tray_icon_desc: Display VieXF in the system tray when minimized.
settings.unlock_fps_desc: Join our Discord to get the exclusive FPS unlocker tool.
settings.clear_backup_desc: Removes old system restore points to save space.
settings.modal_delete_desc: This action cannot be undone. All registry backups created by VieXF will be permanently deleted.
settings.modal_delete_single_desc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{description}}"? This action cannot be undone.
settings.background_image_desc: Upload an image to set as app background.
settings.background_position_desc: Adjust the position of the background image.
settings.background_size_desc: Adjust the size of the background image.
settings.background_opacity_desc: Adjust the opacity of the background image (1% - 100%).
settings.vie_pro_status_desc: Pro unlocks the Aggressive stack in Tweaks for 7 days per activation. Free still gets full Ultra Debloat one-click.
settings.vie_pro_activate_desc: License key: VieXF_PRO-2026 — 7-day Pro trial. Buy full access on Discord.

license.pro_trial_expired_body: Your 7-day Pro trial has expired. Purchase a license on our Discord server to continue using Pro features.
license.pro_trial_auto_open: Opening the Discord channel automatically in {{seconds}}s…

tweaks.title: System Tweaks
tweaks.subtitle: Fine-tune Windows for better performance and privacy.
tweaks.no_tweaks: No tweaks found available for your system.
tweaks.one_click_subtitle_free: Ultra Debloat (Free): remove bloat, background tasks, safe services, power, BCD, network latency, multimedia, Game DVR.
tweaks.one_click_pro_hint: Pro: unlock the Aggressive stack preset (heavy service changes — high risk) under Remember.
tweaks.pro_locked_hint: VieXF Pro required: Settings → enter a key (try VIE-DEMO-PRO).

clean.title: System Cleanup
clean.subtitle: Reclaim disk space by removing unnecessary files.

apps.title: App Center
apps.subtitle: App Store & Bloatware Cleanup all-in-one
apps.no_winget: Winget not available, opening download link...

items.xbox: Xbox Game Bar and related services.

utilities.title: Utilities
utilities.subtitle: Useful tools and shortcuts for system management.

keyboard.title: Keyboard Test
keyboard.desc: Test all keys on your keyboard.

dns.title: DNS Manager
dns.subtitle: Change DNS servers to improve speed or privacy.
dns.flush_desc: Clears local DNS resolver cache. Useful if you can't access some sites.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.subtitle: Manage system restore points and registry backups.
backup.modal_create_desc: This will create a System Restore Point. It allows you to revert changes if something goes wrong. This process might take a few minutes.
backup.restore_confirm: Restore to this point? The PC will restart.

optimize.title: Quick optimize
optimize.subtitle: Watch CPU/RAM/GPU load and run helpful fixes in one place.
optimize.quick_clean_desc: Clears temp files, Prefetch, and system logs — does not empty Recycle Bin.
optimize.flush_dns_desc: Refreshes name resolution when sites or games behave oddly.
optimize.taskmgr_desc: End processes that are hogging CPU or RAM.
optimize.power_desc: Open Windows power plans (e.g. High performance).
optimize.vie_cache_desc: Free local cache data stored by the app.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Check that the UI, backend, and scripts are responding on this PC.

profiles.title: Tweak profiles
profiles.subtitle: Apply a bundle of tweaks for stability, gaming, or daily work.

work.name: Work profile
work.desc: Lean setup for multitasking and battery.

recovery.title: Recovery center
recovery.subtitle: Undo changes and restore a safe system state.
recovery.safe_desc: Boot with minimal modules to narrow down issues.
recovery.toast_safe_on: Safe mode enabled for next startup

logs.title: Logs & events
logs.subtitle: Inspect UI and main-process events for debugging.
